inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 continuing OCF $6.49B − capex $0.97B ÷ 1.64B diluted shares (10-K)
inputs.normalization_note: Continuing operations OCF; excludes discontinued ops cash flow

ai_overlay.status: partial — Data Center MI300/EPYC in segment build; foundry prepayments not in FCF₀
not_in_model_requires_refresh: Hyperscaler custom ASIC share shift (GPU/AI accelerator TAM)
TSMC advanced-node allocation and foundry prepayment timing
MI350/MI400 roadmap gross-margin bridge vs NVIDIA Blackwell
Xilinx FPGA synergy as separate owner-cash line

capex_stress_2026.ocf_assumption_note: [Assumption] ~15% below FY2025 continuing OCF if Data Center orders slip

ai_inflection_bull.fcf_y0_note: [Assumption] FY2027 normalized if Data Center sustains 35%+ revenue growth and margin expands
ai_inflection_bull.drivers: MI300 share gains, EPYC server CPU mix, Client recovery

segments.label: Data Center (EPYC CPUs, Instinct GPUs, AI accelerators)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: FY2025 FCF allocated 48.0% by segment revenue share (10-K)

segments.label: Client and Gaming (Ryzen, Radeon)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: FY2025 FCF allocated 42.0% by segment revenue share

segments.label: Embedded (adaptive SoCs, FPGAs from Xilinx)
segments.owner_cash_y0_source: FY2025 FCF allocated 10.0% by segment revenue share

options.label: Xilinx adaptive computing cross-sell
options.base_terminal_rationale: FPGA revenue inside Embedded segment; no separate terminal
options.notes: Embedded segment growth embeds Xilinx optionality

corporate_drag.notes: Unallocated corp costs net in consolidated OI vs segment sum; no extra drag row

reconciliation.slack_notes: Segment sum @10% ~$97 vs $120 placeholder — price embeds AI share-gain option not fully in segment exits

bear.notes: Data Center share stalls; PC downturn; custom ASIC pressure

base.notes: MI300 ramp continues; Client stable; margin modest expansion

bull.notes: AI accelerator share gains vs NVIDIA; EPYC share in cloud CPUs

option_scan.question: Backlog / RPO / AI capex not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Data Center segment growth; RPO $315M (10-K) immaterial vs revenue

option_scan.question: In-business option: Xilinx FPGA / adaptive computing?
Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: MI300 GPU revenue in Data Center segment

overlay_results.notes: [Assumption] FY2027 normalized if Data Center sustains 35%+ revenue growth and margin expands

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Five additive components map Data Center, Client/Gaming, and Embedded segment owner cash, net financial claims, and AI competition/capex reserve once each.

components.label: Data Center segment owner cash (EPYC CPUs, Instinct GPUs, AI accelerators)

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from AMD/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20260204_rpt20251227_acc0000002488_26_000018.htm: FY2025 revenue $34639.0M (+34% YoY), continuing OCF $6490.0M, capex $970.0M, FCF $5520.0M, cash $5539.0M, debt $2348.0M; contract backfill 2026-07-23.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q1 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 continuing free cash flow (OCF less capex)

assumptions.label: Segment owner cash year zero per diluted share
assumptions.rationale: FY2025 consolidated FCF allocated by segment revenue share (Data Center segment owner cash (EPYC CPUs, Instinct GPUs, AI accelerators)).

assumptions.label: Growth years 1–5
assumptions.rationale: Segment growth from segment_build and FY2025 filing trends.

assumptions.label: Growth years 6–7
assumptions.rationale: Fade after AI ramp normalizes.

assumptions.label: Required return on segment owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Segment reverse-DCF discount; not the stance gate.

assumptions.label: Selling multiple in year 7
assumptions.rationale: Segment exit multiples from segment_build.

assumptions.label: Schedule tie-out to segment_build present value
assumptions.rationale: Scales raw DCF to filing-backed segment PV targets without changing growth mechanics.

assumptions.label: AI competition, custom ASIC, and foundry capex stress reserve
assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for NVIDIA CUDA moat, hyperscaler custom silicon, and HBM/packaging capex timing not fully in low-growth bear case.

calculations.label: Competition and capex reserve per share

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of AMD, including Data Center, Client/Gaming, and Embedded segment owner cash, net corporate liquidity, less AI competition and capex stress reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Three reportable segments valued through segment owner-cash discount on FY2025 FCF allocation; net liquidity and competition reserve are separate overlap keys.

economic_value.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K: stockholders' equity $63.0B; economic value in normalized owner cash ($3.3741/sh consolidated), not GAAP book alone.

component_groups.label: Data Center segment owner cash
component_groups.economic_claim: EPYC server CPUs and Instinct GPU AI accelerator normalized owner cash
component_groups.valuation_basis: Owner-cash discount on segment-allocated FY2025 FCF per share ($1.62/sh).
component_groups.adjustments: MI300 ramp embedded in 16% years 1-5 growth path.

component_groups.label: Client and Gaming segment owner cash
component_groups.economic_claim: Ryzen PC and Radeon gaming/console normalized owner cash
component_groups.valuation_basis: Owner-cash discount on segment-allocated FY2025 FCF per share ($1.42/sh).
component_groups.adjustments: PC cycle recovery uneven; conservative exit multiple.

component_groups.label: Embedded segment owner cash
component_groups.economic_claim: Xilinx adaptive SoC and embedded FPGA normalized owner cash
component_groups.valuation_basis: Owner-cash discount on segment-allocated FY2025 FCF per share ($0.34/sh).
component_groups.adjustments: Highest segment margin; Xilinx synergy embedded in growth.

component_groups.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.economic_claim: Net corporate liquidity after long-term debt
component_groups.valuation_basis: Net asset value on FY2025 filing-locked cash less debt.
component_groups.adjustments: Operating cash minimum judgment; no double-count with segment cash flows.

component_groups.label: AI competition, custom ASIC, and foundry capex stress reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: NVIDIA CUDA moat, hyperscaler custom silicon, foundry prepayment timing
component_groups.valuation_basis: Bounded negative reserve; not full enterprise value haircut.
component_groups.adjustments: Partial dhando: bear IRR -1.7% captures downside but reserve sizes competition risk.

limitations: Segment FCF not separately disclosed; consolidated FCF allocated by revenue share.
AI accelerator share gains versus NVIDIA remain judgment bands.

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Data Center segment owner cash (EPYC CPUs, Instinct GPUs, AI accelerators)
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

top_value_drivers.label: Data Center segment owner cash (EPYC CPUs, Instinct GPUs, AI accelerators)
Client and Gaming segment owner cash (Ryzen, Radeon)
AI competition, custom ASIC, and foundry capex stress reserve
Embedded segment owner cash (adaptive SoCs, Xilinx FPGAs)

falsifiers: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.
